postTitle: You can easily double your income.
postBodyPreview: 16h  • 🤑 MonetizationYou can easily double your income.There are a few ways you can do it.The simplest way is by doubling the number of clients you have.Unfortunately, this comes with a high energy cost.The other way is the best and the one I recommend:Double your prices (now).The first path is sim

tags.reasoning: label=value-flex topic=money-mindset flex_score=3 — Strong strategies for pricing and client value increase.

reply: Wrote a similar post on Skool a few months ago. Not about doubling. But about tripling. . . And quadrupling. . . . . . And even raising price by 10–20x for those who have the balls to do it.
